# What is the Sigenergy developer portal?

The Sigenergy developer portal is built for third-party monitoring platforms, VPP aggregators, and individual device owners. It offers unified, stable, and secure APIs covering device basics, real-time/historical data, alarms, dispatch control, and simulation. The portal includes a one-click VPP sandbox compatible with multiple market rules, enabling strategy replay and integration testing within minutes.

We provide a complete developer toolchain—interactive API documentation, an application console, and fine-grained API quotas—to help you integrate distributed energy into your business quickly and with control.

# Who do we serve?

**Energy device monitoring platforms / VPP service providers:**
We expose comprehensive APIs for device monitoring and device dispatch. Monitoring platforms and VPP providers can use the APIs to obtain their customers’ Sigenergy device information and, when necessary, perform control and dispatch.

**Sigenergy device owners & installers:**
If you have coding capabilities and want to build personalized monitoring & dispatch for your own Sigenergy devices, you can achieve this through our open APIs.

# How to join the Sigenergy developer portal?

There are two ways to become a Sigenergy developer.

## Register as a developer (for monitoring platforms & VPP providers)

If you are a third-party monitoring platform or a VPP provider, please register a Sigenergy developer account.

![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/c975eefdc4c8472b90bbe5decc90abc3.png)

The Sigenergy developer portal currently operates on an invitation basis. You need to obtain an invitation code and enter it during sign-up.

![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/510c572dbd1a407d9dafd4c30e09a56f.png)

To get an invitation code, please contact Sigenergy.

When registering your Sigenergy developer account, you’ll also need to provide information about the application you’re applying for. Describe the usage scenarios and purposes based on your actual needs.

![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/a1fcb8cb1b4e47659b56e11fb1fc1482.png)

After completing and submitting the registration, please be patient. We will inform you of the result via email within **3–5 business days**.

![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/18468111c75641eaaac8b099593fd0e2.png)

## Sign in with a Sigenergy account (for Sigenergy owners & installers)

If you are already a Sigenergy owner or installer and want to use the APIs provided by the Sigenergy developer portal to monitor and control the devices under your account, you can sign in directly with your Sigenergy account—no separate registration required.

# Sign in to the Sigenergy developer portal

Use your account email and password to sign in to the Sigenergy developer portal. If you forget your password, click **“Forgot password?”** and recover it using the email verification code.
![pic](https://s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/sigen-data-public/bdc0e226222c4043adfac3d5340183bd.png)
